text: Expose and document the local runtime validation flow
description: Turn the existing local runtime validation script into an intentional supported workflow by adding a root npm script, documenting how to use it in the release-prep docs, and adding focused test coverage for frontend runtime-config loading so the fallback/runtime-config checklist items are backed by something repeatable.

reflections.context: Make the local runtime validation path explicit and repeatable instead of leaving it as an undocumented ad hoc script.
reflections.outcome: Exposed the validator as a root npm script, documented it in the main README, tightened the release checklist, and added frontend tests proving runtime-config loading/fallback behavior.
reflections.effectiveness: This was a small but high-leverage pass because the launcher logic already existed; the missing piece was making verification discoverable and backed by focused tests.
reflections.lesson: When a verification script already exists, exposing it through the main workflow and documentation often closes more release-prep uncertainty than adding new launcher code.
reflections.pattern: This matches earlier release-prep work where packaging and documentation changes made existing behavior practically usable.

status.comment: Added a root validate:local-runtime script, documented the launcher/runtime-config verification flow in the root README, and added focused frontend runtime-config tests.
